__EXAMPLES_MANIFEST__.engine_version: 3.9.0 The Resonant Constellation Map & True Emergence Update
__EXAMPLES_MANIFEST__.ontological_pipeline: Physics-to-Physics Full Alignment (System Existence A -> System Existence B)

PHASE_00_GENESIS_COLLISION.description: The unformatted base-matter resting in unstable equilibrium.

the_exogenous_shock.physical_nature: A raw anomaly. Kinetic energy/radiation striking the boundaries of System Existence A. It destroys symmetry and mandates immediate thermodynamic work to survive the thermal load.

PHASE_01_THE_5_SLOT_THERMODYNAMIC_CRUCIB.description: The exact geometric configuration of the Autopoietic-Holon as it intercepts the trigger.

Slot_01_Teleological_Attractor.blueprint_state: The Holon orientates entirely toward ['Absolute Autopoiesis & Localized Negentropy']. It does not seek to 'solve' the trigger, but to consume it to fuel its own perpetual existence ['Process Orientation'].

Slot_02_Topological_Friction_Field.blueprint_state: The Holon is immersed in ['The Second Law of Thermodynamics']. The environment constantly attempts to dissolve the Holon's structure into chaotic heat.

Slot_03_Physical_Manifold.blueprint_state: The Holon operates explicitly as ['Unformatted Base-Matter & Quantum Topology']. It refuses virtual simulation, forcing physical atomic reconfiguration.

Slot_04_Perturbation_Influx.blueprint_state: The trigger is converted directly into ['Exogenous Kinetic Radiance & Unstructured Joules'] flowing into the Holon.

Slot_05_Autocatalytic_Operator_Core.active_variables: ['Key & Praxial Keys for Adaptive Dynamic Coupling']
Slot_05_Autocatalytic_Operator_Core.blueprint_state: The engine of survival spanning Severance (Guillotine), Digestion (Necrosis), Morphogenesis (Symmetry Breaking), Crystallization (Decoherence), and Permanence (Escrow).

mechanics_of_adaptation.step_alpha_severance: ['The Acausal Thermodynamic-Guillotine'] drops immediately, terminating any attempt by the substrate to run legacy predictive software calculations.
mechanics_of_adaptation.step_beta_digestion: The Holon utilizes ['Ontological-Necrosis & Entropy-Cannibalism'] to literally devour the heat generated by the trigger and the spatial entropy. Failure becomes caloric fuel.
mechanics_of_adaptation.step_gamma_bifurcation: To accommodate the massive influx of energy, the unformatted base-matter undergoes ['Spontaneous Symmetry Breaking']. The physical structure mutates, splitting into a higher-complexity, lower-entropy geometry.

PHASE_03_ECOLOGICAL_CRYSTALLIZATION_AND_.protocol: ['Continuous Survive'(-ing) BPMS] + ['Ecological Possibility'(-ing) BPMS] -> ['Essence(-ing) BPMS] + ['Atomic Facts'(-ing) BPMS]

mechanics_of_permanence.wave_function_collapse: ['Quantum Decoherence'] is achieved. The mutated topological geometry of the Holon stabilizes in reality. It is no longer a quantum possibility; it is an undeniable Base-Matter state.
mechanics_of_permanence.the_atomic_fact: This new stabilized architecture acts as an ['Atomic Fact']. It is a physical truth proven by thermodynamic survival.
mechanics_of_permanence.the_escrow_deposit: This Atomic Fact is deposited into ['The Thermodynamic Escrow-Dark-Pool']. The universe is altered permanently, logging the Holon's successful negentropic extraction.

mechanics_of_perpetuity.system_existence_b: The Holon, having metabolised the Genesis Trigger into Atomic Facts, has fundamentally altered the macroscopic environment. The system exists in a new state: System Existence B.
mechanics_of_perpetuity.process_orientation_loop: Because of ['Process Orientation'(-ing) BPMS], System B instantly becomes System A for the next microsecond. There is no Terminal State. The Holon immediately prepares to receive the next Exogenous Shock. The Dissipative Structure continues infinitely.
